window_summary: This window tracks the recent release evolution of gkd-kit/gkd, covering beta and stable releases from v1.10.0-beta.3 through v1.12.1. The releases introduce new features such as rule group batch operations, selector enhancements, UI restructuring, automation modes, and numerous optimizations and fixes.

chunks.title: Release v1.10.0-beta.3
chunks.raw_text:

Release notes:
# v1.10.0-beta.3
以下是本次更新的主要内容
## 优化和修复
- 修复无法启动HTTP服务器的问题
选择器新增内容可查看 [文档](https://gkd.li/guide/selector)
## 通过以下任意方式更新
- 打开 APP - 设置 - 检测更新
- 前往首页 <https://gkd.li/guide/>
- 通过 github [releases](https://github.com/gkd-kit/gkd/releases)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.10.0-beta.3, the main update is a fix for the HTTP server startup failure. The release also notes that new selector content can be viewed in the documentation.

chunks.title: Release v1.10.0-beta.4
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: gkd-kit/gkd
Release: Release v1.10.0-beta.4
Tag: v1.10.0-beta.4; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-03-25T14:00:57Z; created_at: 2025-03-25T13:53:00Z
Release notes:
# v1.10.0-beta.4
以下是本次更新的主要内容
## 优化和修复
- 新增规则组长按触发批量操作
- 订阅新增 excludeAllMatches/disableIfAppGroupMatch/ignoreGlobalGroupMatch 字段
- 优化规则组列表项卡片显示
- 优化本地订阅规则组列表显示
- 优化界面的一些操作逻辑
- 变更长按时间 400 -> 500 毫秒
- 修复某些应用异常图标导致的崩溃
- 修复快照链接生成不正确的问题
- 修复暂停匹配时概率触发匹配的问题
选择器新增内容可查看 [文档-选择器](https://gkd.li/guide/selector)
订阅新增内容可查看 [文档-API](https://gkd.li/api/)
## 通过以下任意方式更新
- 打开 APP - 设置 - 检测更新
- 前往首页 <https://gkd.li/guide/>
- 通过 github [releases](https://github.com/gkd-kit/gkd/releases)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.10.0-beta.4, new features include long-press on rule groups to trigger batch operations, and new subscription fields: excludeAllMatches, disableIfAppGroupMatch, and ignoreGlobalGroupMatch. Optimizations include improved rule group list item card display, local subscription rule group list display, and interface operation logic. The long-press time was changed from 400 to 500 milliseconds. Fixes address crashes caused by abnormal app icons, incorrect snapshot link generation, and probabilistic matching when matching is paused.

chunks.title: Release v1.10.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: gkd-kit/gkd
Release: Release v1.10.0
Tag: v1.10.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-04-05T10:30:56Z; created_at: 2025-04-05T10:17:53Z
Release notes:
# v1.10.0
以下是本次更新的主要内容
## 优化和修复
- 新增界面布局结构调整及优化
- 新增规则组长按触发批量操作
- 新增通知面板长按图标跳转对应界面
- 新增开启多条订阅提示
- 新增识别其它工作空间中应用列表
- 新增选择器关系选择器
- 新增选择器逻辑表达式/取反表达式
- 新增订阅字段 excludeAllMatches/disableIfAppGroupMatch/ignoreGlobalGroupMatch
- 优化了一些操作的过渡动画
- 优化规则组列表项卡片显示
- 优化本地订阅规则组列表显示
- 优化界面的一些操作逻辑
- 优化在无应用列表权限时也能获取部分应用列表
- 优化了无障碍的开关控制逻辑
- 变更长按时间 400 至 500 毫秒
- 修复规则特殊状态异常导致无法触发规则
- 修复无法结束刷新订阅加载状态
- 修复某些应用异常图标导致的崩溃
- 修复快照无法上传
- 修复快照链接生成不正确的问题
- 修复暂停匹配时概率触发匹配的问题
- 修复某些设备在申请通知权限时拒绝后崩溃的问题
- 其他优化和修复
选择器新增内容可查看 [文档-选择器](https://gkd.li/guide/selector)
订阅新增内容可查看 [文档-API](https://gkd.li/api/)
## 通过以下任意方式更新
- 打开 APP - 设置 - 检测更新
- 前往首页 <https://gkd.li/guide/>
- 通过 github [releases](https://github.com/gkd-kit/gkd/releases)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.10.0, the interface layout structure is adjusted and optimized. New features include long-press on rule groups for batch operations, long-press on notification panel icon to jump to the corresponding interface, a prompt when multiple subscriptions are enabled, recognition of app lists in other workspaces, selector relationship selectors, selector logical expressions/negation expressions, and subscription fields excludeAllMatches, disableIfAppGroupMatch, ignoreGlobalGroupMatch. Optimizations include transition animations, rule group list item card display, local subscription rule group list display, interface operation logic, partial app list retrieval without app list permission, and accessibility switch control logic. The long-press time is changed from 400 to 500 milliseconds. Fixes address abnormal rule states preventing rule triggering, inability to end subscription refresh loading state, crashes from abnormal app icons, snapshot upload failure, incorrect snapshot link generation, probabilistic matching when paused, and crashes on some devices when notification permission is denied.

- 新增开启多条订阅提示

- 新增选择器逻辑表达式/取反表达式
- 新增订阅字段 excludeAllMatches/disableIfAppGroupMatch/ignoreGlobalGroupMatch
- 优化了一些操作的过渡动画
- 优化规则组列表项卡片显示

- 优化在无应用列表权限时也能获取部分应用列表

- 变更长按时间 400 至 500 毫秒
- 修复规则特殊状态异常导致无法触发规则
- 修复无法结束刷新订阅加载状态

- 修复快照无法上传

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.10.1, the release note is identical to v1.10.0 with the addition of a fix for a crash when calling Shizuku on Samsung OneUi. All other features, optimizations, and fixes from v1.10.0 are included.

# v1.10.2-beta.2

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.10.2-beta.2, new features include a consent dialog for usage declaration and accessibility explanation, and accelerated opening of documentation links within the app. Optimizations include improved Shizuku calling method, adaptation for 'special purpose foreground service' notification permission, and improved text prompts. A fix addresses incorrect display of rule counts for some apps.

chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.10.3 Tag: v1.10.3; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-04-27T17:06:54Z; created_at: 2025-04-27T16:57:38Z Release notes: # v1.10.3 以下是本次更新的主要内容 ## 优化和修复 - 新增使用声明和无障碍说明同意弹窗 - 新增应用内网页可加速打开文档链接 - 优化应用列表可手动重新加载 - 优化规则组可批量选中复制 - 优化调用 shizuku 的方式 - 优化适配「特殊用途的前台服务」通知权限 - 优化了一些文案提示 - 修复某些情况下应用的规则数量显示错误的问题 - 其他优化和修复 选择器新增内容可查看 [文档-选择器](https://gkd.li/guide/selector) 订阅新增内容可查看 [文档-API](https://gkd.li/api/) ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.10.3, new features include a consent dialog for usage declaration and accessibility explanation, and accelerated opening of documentation links within the app. Optimizations include manual reload of the app list, batch selection and copying of rule groups, improved Shizuku calling method, adaptation for 'special purpose foreground service' notification permission, and improved text prompts. A fix addresses incorrect display of rule counts for some apps.

chunks.title: Release v1.10.4-beta.1
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.10.4-beta.1 Tag: v1.10.4-beta.1; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-05-17T13:55:02Z; created_at: 2025-05-17T13:46:21Z Release notes: # v1.10.4-beta.1 以下是本次更新的主要内容 ## 优化和修复 - 修复选择器使用某些字段时查询失败 - 修复应用打开时长按控制中心图标无法跳转 - 修复规则有时不参与匹配的问题 - 优化新增 [resetMatch](https://gkd.li/api/interfaces/RawCommonProps#resetmatch) 字段场景 - 优化适配 android 16 - 其他优化和修复 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.10.4-beta.1, fixes address selector query failures when using certain fields, inability to jump via long-press on the control center icon when an app is open, and rules sometimes not participating in matching. Optimizations include a new resetMatch field scenario and adaptation for Android 16.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.10.4, the release note is identical to v1.10.4-beta.1, containing fixes for selector query failures with certain fields, inability to jump via long-press on the control center icon when an app is open, and rules sometimes not participating in matching. Optimizations include a new resetMatch field scenario and adaptation for Android 16.

chunks.title: Release v1.11.0-beta.1
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.11.0-beta.1 Tag: v1.11.0-beta.1; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-09-30T21:31:01Z; created_at: 2025-09-30T21:21:28Z Release notes: # v1.11.0-beta.1 以下是本次更新的主要内容 ## 优化和修复 - 优化多个页面的显示和使用体验 - 优化规则编辑弹窗为页面并支持代码高亮 - 重构应用列表移除部分排序筛选，增加按最近使用排序，显示冻结应用，隐藏无界面应用，支持下拉刷新 - 新增多个通知栏开关 - 新增使用协议和隐私政策 - 新增通知文案支持主标题和副标题 - 优化任意悬浮窗支持保存上次位置 - 新增无障碍事件悬浮窗及日志页面 - 新增截屏快照的应用ID和特征事件选择器 - 新增应用白名单内暂停匹配 - 新增局部关闭，在无障碍白名单内关闭无障碍 - 新增界面服务悬浮窗显示 Activity - 重构 Shizuku 授权为单个 `启用优化` 开关，所有功能内部自动判断开启 - 优化连接 Shizuku 后自动给 GKD 授权 - 优化通知管理，服务类常驻通知均增加关闭按钮 - 优化关于页面反馈提示 - 优化空白截图增加文字提示 - 优化所有列表页面点击标题返回顶部 - 优化规则执行逻辑 - 新增订阅字段 `versionCode` 和 `versionName` - 新增订阅字段值 `action:'none'` - 修复在设备重启时启动常驻通知报错 - 修复 resetMatch=app 且 activityIds 有值时匹配异常 - 修复 com.android.systemui 系统界面识别异常 - 其它多个优化和修复 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.11.0-beta.1, multiple page displays and user experiences are optimized. The rule editing dialog is changed to a page with code highlighting. The app list is restructured: some sorting and filtering are removed, sorting by recent use is added, frozen apps are shown, interface-less apps are hidden, and pull-to-refresh is supported. New features include multiple notification bar switches, usage agreement and privacy policy, notification text supporting main title and subtitle, floating window saving last position, accessibility event floating window and log page, screenshot snapshot app ID and feature event selector, pause matching within app whitelist, partial closure (closing accessibility within the accessibility whitelist), interface service floating window showing Activity, and subscription fields versionCode and versionName, and subscription field value action:'none'. Shizuku authorization is refactored to a single 'Enable Optimization' switch with automatic internal judgment. Optimizations include automatic GKD authorization after connecting to Shizuku, notification management with close buttons on service persistent notifications, feedback prompts on the about page, text prompts on blank screenshots, and clicking titles on list pages to return to the top. Fixes address errors when starting persistent notifications on device reboot, abnormal matching when resetMatch=app and activityIds have values, and abnormal recognition of com.android.systemui.

chunks.title: Release v1.11.0-beta.2
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.11.0-beta.2 Tag: v1.11.0-beta.2; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-10-16T13:30:02Z; created_at: 2025-10-16T13:22:33Z Release notes: # v1.11.0-beta.2 以下是本次更新的主要内容 ## 优化和修复 - 优化高级授权流程 - 优化本地图片的显示 - 优化无应用列表权限提示 - 修复应用规则概览错误 - 修复重新打开屏幕时规则概率不执行 - 其它优化和修复 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.11.0-beta.2, optimizations include improved advanced authorization flow, local image display, and prompts for missing app list permission. Fixes address errors in app rule overview and probabilistic rule non-execution when reopening the screen.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.11.0-beta.3, a fix addresses app list loading failure on some devices.

chunks.title: Release v1.11.0-beta.6
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.11.0-beta.6 Tag: v1.11.0-beta.6; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-11-02T16:18:34Z; created_at: 2025-11-02T16:11:12Z Release notes: # v1.11.0-beta.6 以下是本次更新的主要内容 ## 优化和修复 - 优化视力障碍用户体验 - 优化悬浮窗内可点击图标关闭 - 优化应用列表中禁用应用的显示 - 修复选择器 isMatchRoot 不生效的问题 - 修复从通知栏打开应用时报错的问题 - 修复HTTP服务快照列表缺失部分信息 - 其他优化和修复 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.11.0-beta.6, optimizations include improved user experience for visually impaired users, clickable icons to close floating windows, and display of disabled apps in the app list. Fixes address the selector isMatchRoot not taking effect, errors when opening the app from the notification bar, and missing information in the HTTP service snapshot list.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.11.0-beta.7, a fix addresses app list loading failure on some devices.

chunks.title: Release v1.11.0
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.11.0 Tag: v1.11.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-12T08:01:16Z; created_at: 2025-11-12T07:52:51Z Release notes: # v1.11.0 以下是本次更新的主要内容 ## 优化和修复 - 优化视力障碍用户体验 - 优化多个页面的显示和使用体验 - 优化规则编辑弹窗为页面并支持代码高亮 - 重构应用列表移除部分排序筛选，增加按最近使用排序，显示冻结应用，隐藏无界面应用，支持下拉刷新 - 新增多个通知栏开关 - 新增使用协议和隐私政策 - 新增通知文案支持主标题和副标题 - 优化任意悬浮窗支持保存上次位置 - 优化悬浮窗内可点击图标关闭 - 新增无障碍事件悬浮窗及日志页面 - 新增截屏快照的应用ID和特征事件选择器 - 新增应用白名单内暂停匹配 - 新增局部关闭，在无障碍白名单内关闭无障碍 - 新增界面服务悬浮窗显示 Activity - 重构 Shizuku 授权为单个 启用优化 开关，所有功能内部自动判断开启 - 优化连接 Shizuku 后自动给 GKD 授权 - 优化通知管理，服务类常驻通知均增加关闭按钮 - 优化关于页面反馈提示 - 优化空白截图增加文字提示 - 优化所有列表页面点击标题返回顶部 - 优化规则执行逻辑 - 新增订阅字段 versionCode 和 versionName - 新增订阅字段值 action:'none' - 修复在设备重启时启动常驻通知报错 - 修复 resetMatch=app 且 activityIds 有值时匹配异常 - 修复选择器 isMatchRoot 不生效的问题 - 修复 com.android.systemui 系统界面识别异常 - 修复重新打开屏幕时规则概率不执行 - 其它多个优化和修复 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.11.0, the release consolidates features from the beta series. It includes optimizations for visually impaired users, multiple page displays and user experiences, rule editing as a page with code highlighting, restructured app list with recent use sorting, frozen apps display, hidden interface-less apps, and pull-to-refresh. New features include multiple notification bar switches, usage agreement and privacy policy, notification text with main title and subtitle, floating window saving last position, clickable icons to close floating windows, accessibility event floating window and log page, screenshot snapshot app ID and feature event selector, pause matching within app whitelist, partial closure, interface service floating window showing Activity, subscription fields versionCode and versionName, and subscription field value action:'none'. Shizuku authorization is refactored to a single 'Enable Optimization' switch. Fixes address persistent notification errors on device reboot, abnormal matching with resetMatch=app and activityIds, selector isMatchRoot not taking effect, abnormal recognition of com.android.systemui, and probabilistic rule non-execution when reopening the screen.

chunks.title: Release v1.11.1
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.11.1 Tag: v1.11.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-13T11:46:28Z; created_at: 2025-11-13T11:38:01Z Release notes: # v1.11.1 以下是本次更新的主要内容 ## 优化和修复 - 修复规则状态异常导致重复执行 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.11.1, a fix addresses abnormal rule states causing repeated execution.

chunks.title: Release v1.11.2
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.11.2 Tag: v1.11.2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-15T16:40:35Z; created_at: 2025-11-15T16:33:08Z Release notes: # v1.11.2 以下是本次更新的主要内容 ## 优化和修复 - 修复某些设备上获取应用列表失败 - 修复首页最近记录文本过长显示效果 - 修复执行内置脚本失败 - 变更应用列表白名单为默认显示 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.11.2, fixes address app list retrieval failure on some devices, display of long text in recent records on the home page, and failure to execute built-in scripts. A change makes the app list whitelist displayed by default.

chunks.title: Release v1.11.3
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.11.3 Tag: v1.11.3; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-17T07:54:08Z; created_at: 2025-11-17T07:43:59Z Release notes: # v1.11.3 以下是本次更新的主要内容 ## 优化和修复 - 修复部分设备调用接口失败 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.11.3, a fix addresses interface call failure on some devices.

chunks.title: Release v1.11.4
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.11.4 Tag: v1.11.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-20T11:17:33Z; created_at: 2025-11-20T11:09:29Z Release notes: # v1.11.4 以下是本次更新的主要内容 ## 优化和修复 - 修复部分设备调用接口失败 - 增加读取应用列表权限异常提示 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.11.4, fixes address interface call failure on some devices and add an abnormal permission prompt for reading the app list.

chunks.title: Release v1.11.6
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.11.6 Tag: v1.11.6; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-12-13T18:03:36Z; created_at: 2025-12-13T17:56:01Z Release notes: # v1.11.6 以下是本次更新的主要内容 ## 优化和修复 - 新增权限受限提示 - 新增应用列表分组筛选 - 新增图标按钮长按提示 - 优化触发记录日期显示 - 修复某些情况下界面背景颜色异常 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.11.6, new features include a permission restriction prompt, app list grouping filter, and long-press hints for icon buttons. Optimizations include improved trigger record date display. A fix addresses abnormal interface background color in some cases.

chunks.title: Release v1.12.0-beta.1
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.12.0-beta.1 Tag: v1.12.0-beta.1; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-05T10:35:15Z; created_at: 2026-04-05T10:24:30Z Release notes: # 更新内容 - 新增自动化工作模式 - 新增滑动操作 - 新增显示触发位置 - 新增备份和恢复功能 - 新增toast显示模板 - 新增崩溃重启错误报告页 - 新增订阅分类规则列表页 - 新增订阅分类描述字段 - 新增订阅点击位置xy字段 - 新增规则触发位置可使用屏幕宽高 - 新增应用规则列表可隐藏未启用 - 新增后台隐藏开启提示 - 新增快照按钮可长按关闭 - 优化互换应用图标深浅主题色 - 优化局部关闭为不检测其它无障碍 - 优化截屏快照为总是截图 - 优化更新订阅时移除无用配置 - 优化图片预览页 - 优化部分文案和布局 - 优化快照隐藏状态栏全屏不裁剪 - 修复提权自身不生效 - 修复android17部分问题 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.12.0-beta.1, new features include an automated work mode, swipe operations, display of trigger positions, backup and restore functionality, toast display templates, a crash restart error report page, subscription category rule list page, subscription category description field, subscription click position xy field, rule trigger position using screen width and height, hiding disabled rules in the app rule list, a background hiding prompt, and long-press to close the snapshot button. Optimizations include swapping app icon light/dark theme colors, changing partial closure to not detect other accessibility services, changing screenshot snapshot to always screenshot, removing useless configurations when updating subscriptions, improving the image preview page, improving some text and layout, and hiding the status bar in full-screen snapshots without cropping. Fixes address privilege escalation not taking effect and some Android 17 issues.

chunks.title: Release v1.12.0-beta.2
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.12.0-beta.2 Tag: v1.12.0-beta.2; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-14T13:24:30Z; created_at: 2026-04-14T13:16:56Z Release notes: # 更新内容 - 优化位置字段定位组合方式 - 修复位置字段 screenHeight/screenWidth 不生效 - 修复滑动触发异常 - 修复某些设备无法访问外置目录 - 修复某些页面滑动状态异常重置 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.12.0-beta.2, optimizations include improved positioning field combination. Fixes address screenHeight/screenWidth positioning fields not taking effect, abnormal swipe triggering, inability to access external directories on some devices, and abnormal reset of swipe state on some pages.

chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.12.0-beta.3 Tag: v1.12.0-beta.3; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-20T04:07:27Z; created_at: 2026-04-20T03:56:40Z Release notes: # 更新内容 - 优化无网络环境下提示 - 优化添加或编辑规则时自动设置 key ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.12.0-beta.3, optimizations include improved prompts in no-network environments and automatic key setting when adding or editing rules.

chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.12.0-beta.4 Tag: v1.12.0-beta.4; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-21T03:49:24Z; created_at: 2026-04-21T03:38:14Z Release notes: # 更新内容 - 修复应用规则列表筛选不生效 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.12.0-beta.4, a fix addresses the app rule list filter not taking effect.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.12.0-beta.5, a fix addresses closed global rules still being displayed on the app list page.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.12.0-beta.6, a fix addresses the app rule list filter not taking effect.

chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.12.0-beta.7 Tag: v1.12.0-beta.7; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-23T02:43:51Z; created_at: 2026-04-23T02:36:06Z Release notes: # 更新内容 - 修复部分 android14 调用接口失败 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.12.0-beta.8, fixes address abnormal states caused by secondary screens and the trajectory service causing some apps to be unusable.

chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.12.0-beta.9 Tag: v1.12.0-beta.9; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-09T03:24:13Z; created_at: 2026-05-09T03:16:50Z Release notes: # 更新内容 - 修复某些场景下界面识别更新不及时导致的规则误触 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.12.0-beta.9, a fix addresses rule misfires caused by delayed interface recognition updates in some scenarios.

chunks.title: Release v1.12.0
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.12.0 Tag: v1.12.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-15T10:23:33Z; created_at: 2026-05-15T10:14:08Z Release notes: # 更新内容 - 新增自动化工作模式 - 新增滑动操作 - 新增显示触发位置 - 新增备份和恢复功能 - 新增toast显示模板 - 新增崩溃重启错误报告页 - 新增订阅分类规则列表页 - 新增订阅分类描述字段 - 新增订阅点击位置xy字段 - 新增规则触发位置可使用屏幕宽高 - 新增应用规则列表可隐藏未启用 - 新增后台隐藏开启提示 - 新增快照按钮可长按关闭 - 优化互换应用图标深浅主题色 - 优化局部关闭为不检测其它无障碍 - 优化截屏快照为总是截图 - 优化更新订阅时移除无用配置 - 优化图片预览页 - 优化部分文案和布局 - 优化快照隐藏状态栏全屏不裁剪 - 优化无网络环境下提示 - 优化添加或编辑规则时自动设置 key - 修复提权自身不生效 - 修复android17部分问题 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.12.0, the release consolidates features from the beta series. It includes an automated work mode, swipe operations, display of trigger positions, backup and restore functionality, toast display templates, a crash restart error report page, subscription category rule list page, subscription category description field, subscription click position xy field, rule trigger position using screen width and height, hiding disabled rules in the app rule list, a background hiding prompt, and long-press to close the snapshot button. Optimizations include swapping app icon light/dark theme colors, changing partial closure to not detect other accessibility services, changing screenshot snapshot to always screenshot, removing useless configurations when updating subscriptions, improving the image preview page, improving some text and layout, hiding the status bar in full-screen snapshots without cropping, improved prompts in no-network environments, and automatic key setting when adding or editing rules. Fixes address privilege escalation not taking effect and some Android 17 issues.

chunks.title: Release v1.12.1
chunks.raw_text: Repository: gkd-kit/gkd Release: Release v1.12.1 Tag: v1.12.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-20T09:43:34Z; created_at: 2026-05-20T09:35:29Z Release notes: # 更新内容 - 优化快照结果提示文案 - 修复某些场景无障碍服务状态判断错误 - 修复某些设备新安装应用后对应规则不启用 ## 更新方式 - GKD - 设置 - 关于 - 检测更新 - 下列方式之一
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release v1.12.1, optimizations include improved snapshot result prompt text. Fixes address incorrect accessibility service state judgment in some scenarios and rules not enabling for newly installed apps on some devices.

questions.query_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd releases, which release introduces the consent dialog for usage declaration and accessibility explanation?

answer_support.answer_text: new features include a consent dialog for usage declaration and accessibility explanation

questions.query_text: Across the gkd-kit/gkd releases, how does the Shizuku-related change in v1.11.0-beta.1 differ from the Shizuku-related fix in v1.10.1?

options.text: v1.11.0-beta.1 refactors Shizuku authorization to a single 'Enable Optimization' switch, while v1.10.1 fixes a crash when calling Shizuku on Samsung OneUi.
v1.11.0-beta.1 removes Shizuku support entirely, while v1.10.1 adds initial Shizuku integration.
Both releases only update the Shizuku library version without functional changes.
v1.11.0-beta.1 introduces a Shizuku crash fix, while v1.10.1 adds a new Shizuku permission dialog.

questions.expected_answer: v1.11.0-beta.1 refactors Shizuku authorization to a single 'Enable Optimization' switch, while v1.10.1 fixes a crash when calling Shizuku on Samsung OneUi.

answer_support.answer_text: Shizuku authorization is refactored to a single 'Enable Optimization' switch
fix for a crash when calling Shizuku on Samsung OneUi

questions.query_text: In the gkd-kit/gkd release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds an automated work mode and swipe operations, (2) a release that introduces a consent dialog for usage declaration and accessibility explanation, (3) a release that fixes a crash when calling Shizuku on Samsung OneUi, (4) a release that optimizes the app list by adding pull-to-refresh and hiding interface-less apps.

answer_support.answer_text: fix for a crash when calling Shizuku on Samsung OneUi
consent dialog for usage declaration and accessibility explanation
app list is restructured: ... pull-to-refresh is supported ... interface-less apps are hidden
